reason: This is a general tweet about relationships and letting go, with no reference to ISIS or extremist ideology. It translates roughly to discussing holding onto loved ones but letting go if tired.
original_post: احنا نتمسك باللي نحب ونحاول قد م نقدر نحافظ عالعلاقه،بس اذا تعبنا؟ نفلت! واذا افلتنا م نرجع.
